title: PLAN card frontmatter
description: Plan document. constellation/plan.md is PLAN-PROJECT; scoped plans (PLAN-FRONTEND) live in plan/. Keep plans short — decisions belong in DOC cards (kind: decision), status on the cards themselves.

scope.description: Area this plan covers, e.g. frontend. Omit for the project plan.

connected_repos.description: Sibling repos this project coordinates with (declare on PLAN-PROJECT). Repo-level links only — NOT card connections; cards never reference another repo's cards. Each entry's path is local topology and is never validated by lint.

name.description: Lowercase id used as the `repo` selector in MCP tools (e.g. pyramid-server).

path.description: Path to the connected repo's root, relative to this repo's root (e.g. ../pyramid-server). May be absolute.

description.description: What the connected repo is, e.g. 'Back-end API for Pyramid, written in Go'.
